title: PsychoWinter
description: An endless storm with no hope of rescue.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6343e388cd5e248101158dfbc841ec7bc07da5fa_0.webp)

**Modpack inspired by ''**The Long Dark**'' game and ''TerraFirmaCraft'' mod**

---
- Hard? Yes. 
- Сhallenging? Yes. 
- Contains minor elements of horror. 
- _Incompatible with shaders because of Primal Winter mod_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I had to add this list here:

- [Primal Winter](https://modrinth.com/mod/primal-winter)
- [Ex Nihilo: Sequentia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-nihilo-sequentia)
- [Snow! Real Magic! ⛄️ (Neo/Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/308663)
- [Mixin In Heaven](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/870903)
- [Explorers Compass](https://github.com/MattCzyr/ExplorersCompass)
- [Eyes in the Darkness](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/304719)
- [Pollen](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/544350)
- [Configured](https://mrcrayfish.com/mods?id=configured)
- [Kiwi](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/303657)
- [Realistic Sleep](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/448453)
- [Grass To Seeds](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/813123)
- [Crosshair Bobbing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xbob)
- [Presence Footsteps [Forge]](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/433068)
 </details>
 
- There is no purpose in this survival _yet_.

- 👥 If u want to help me with this modpack, - dm me in discord - _cucumbers5_
